title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.107 - Remedies of member entitled to distribution
text:
347.107.  Remedies of member entitled to distribution. — At the time a member becomes entitled to receive a distribution in accordance with sections 347.010 to 347.187 and the operating agreement, that member has the status of, and is entitled to, all remedies available to a creditor of the limited liability company with respect to the distribution.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.764) 
Effective 12-01-93
